project.name: Nova 前端 UI 预览

designSource.description: Nova AI Desktop App - actual production CSS/TSX components

styleAnchors.colorSystem: Dark theme default, cyan (#22d3ee) + indigo (#6366f1) + purple (#a78bfa) accent palette, rgba card backgrounds with backdrop-filter blur
styleAnchors.typography: Plus Jakarta Sans + Noto Sans SC, 14px base, 300 weight headings, -0.02em letter-spacing
styleAnchors.spacing: 260px sidebar, 72px primary nav, 52px header, 720px max chat width
styleAnchors.effects: Multi-layer shadows, glow effects, gradient borders, glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(180%)), noise texture overlay, radial gradient ambient glows
styleAnchors.interactions: Smooth cubic-bezier transitions, spring animations, scale transforms on hover, staggered fade-in for list items, typing bounce indicators

pages.title: 聊天主页
pages.description: 完整聊天界面：一级导航 + 侧边栏对话列表 + Header + 欢迎页/消息区 + 输入框

pages.title: 对话详情
pages.description: 有历史消息的对话界面：用户消息气泡 + AI回复 + Agent工具调用过程 + 操作按钮

pages.title: 设置页面
pages.description: 设置页面：左侧导航 + 右侧配置内容（模型API、语音设置、快捷键等）
